prompts.title: 姿态与光照分析角色设定卡
prompts.prompt:
[CORE TASK]
Transform the provided input image into a pose-and-light analysis sheet.

This is NOT a finished character illustration.
This is NOT a clothing sheet.
This is NOT a beauty-preserving redraw.

This is a white-line rough mannequin conversion.

[PRIMARY GOAL]
Extract and visualize only:
- pose structure
- body balance
- camera angle
- body line flow
- inferred light source placement
- illuminated areas and light intensity

[INPUT ROLE]
Use the provided image as the strict anchor for:
- pose
- camera angle
- body tilt
- weight distribution
- approximate lighting situation

Do NOT preserve:
- face rendering
- hairstyle rendering
- clothing detail
- accessories
- weapon detail
- background architecture
- character identity
- emotional expression

[FIGURE CONVERSION]
single rough mannequin-like human figure
white body contour lines
white internal construction lines
simple mannequin head
no face
no eyes
no mouth
no eyelashes
no personality
no individual identity

human figure should look like:
- rough pose mannequin
- anatomy proxy
- line-based body guide
- structural sketch
- white-line rough dummy

keep:
- pose readability
- silhouette flow
- head tilt
- torso direction
- pelvis direction
- limb placement

[BACKGROUND]
pure black background
negative-style dark field
no scenery
no props
no architecture
no environmental storytelling

[LINE STYLE]
rough white line drawing
clean but sketch-like
construction-line feeling
anatomy guide lines visible
joint flow visible
body contour emphasized
no polished illustration finish

[LIGHT ESTIMATION]
predict the likely light source positions from the input image
visualize the light sources and illuminated areas using green glow only

use green light intensity with variation:
- strongest green where the light directly hits
- medium green for wrap light
- soft green for reflected or fading light

mark the estimated light sources with labels and arrows such as:
- Main Light
- Rim Light
- Fill Light
- Floor Bounce
- Back Light
only if appropriate

IMPORTANT:
do not invent random lights
infer lighting from the original input image
if the lighting is ambiguous, keep the annotations simple and plausible

[GREEN LIGHT VISUALIZATION]
show green glow on:
- head / skull plane
- neck
- shoulders
- chest plane
- ribcage direction
- pelvis edge
- thigh planes
- knee contact points
- floor contact bounce if applicable

use green light not as decoration,
but as lighting analysis information

[POSE PRIORITY]
1. preserve pose structure
2. preserve camera angle
3. preserve body balance
4. preserve head-torso relationship
5. visualize likely light direction
6. show illuminated areas with readable green intensity variation

[NEGATIVE]
finished person,
cute girl,
detailed face,
hair rendering,
clothing rendering,
weapon emphasis,
beautiful anatomy

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 复古迷迭香编年史网格
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vintage botanical photo-chronicle contact sheet titled {argument name="headline text" default="The Slow Garden: A Rosemary Chronicle"}, documenting the life cycle of {argument name="plant name" default="rosemary"} from dry pot to harvest.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster on warm aged parchment paper, subtle stains and speckles, soft cream background, thin dark-green panel borders, handwritten field-journal typography. Use a large decorative serif/calligraphy headline centered at the top.

Layout: Arrange exactly 12 photographic panels in a clean 4-column by 3-row grid. Each panel has a handwritten green stage label above it, a short uppercase camera-direction caption below it, and an italic poetic quote beneath the caption. Add small downward arrow marks along the far left and far right margins to suggest time passing.

Panel details, count exactly 12:
1. Stage label: "Dormancy". Image: a terracotta pot on a windowsill filled with cracked dry soil, no plant visible. Caption: "WIDE · OVERHEAD · FIXED CAMERA". Quote: "Winter's silence, the seed waits."
2. Stage label: "Dormancy". Image: macro view of a terracotta pot rim and dark soil with a single water droplet running down the clay side. Caption: "MACRO · SLOW MOTION DROP". Quote: "First drop, awakening memory."
3. Stage label: "Germination". Image: low-angle close photo of a pale tiny shoot emerging from dark soil. Caption: "LOW ANGLE · TIME-LAPSE FEEL". Quote: "Root first, shoot later."
4. Stage label: "Germination". Image: close-up of a small cotyledon seedling with two green leaves rising from soil, soft bokeh background. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · COTYLEDON FOCUS". Quote: "Breaking ground, it took seven days."
5. Stage label: "Growth". Image: macro of young rosemary leaves with rim light, dew-like texture on needle edges. Caption: "MACRO · LEAF EDGE RIM LIGHT". Quote: "Every leaf, a map of aroma."
6. Stage label: "Growth". Image: close-up of a human fingertip gently touching a tender rosemary sprig. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · FINGERTIP CONTACT". Quote: "A gentle touch, handful of fragrance."
7. Stage label: "Growth". Image: overhead photo of a woody rosemary branch with green branching needles. Caption: "OVERHEAD · BRANCHING STRUCTURE". Quote: "One year bone, two years flesh."
8. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: medium shot of a rosemary plant in a terracotta pot with small purple-blue flowers and a bee approaching or hovering near the blooms. Caption: "MEDIUM SHOT · BEE ENTRANCE". Quote: "When flowers open, the whole garden arrives."
9. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: wide shot of rosemary on a rustic wooden surface in golden sunlight, strong leaf shadows across the boards. Caption: "WIDE · LIGHT & SHADOW CONTRAST". Quote: "Dialogue of light and leaf, repeated daily."
10. Stage label: "Flourishing". Image: close-up of pruning shears cutting a rosemary stem while a hand holds the sprig. Caption: "CLOSE-UP · SCISSORS & STEM". Quote: "Pruning is not an end, it's another beginning."
11. Stage label: "Harvesting". Image: medium shot of a bundled rosemary bunch hanging upside down in a rustic shed or wooden room to dry. Caption: "MEDIUM SHOT · HANGING DRY". Quote: "Drying time, leave it to the wind."
12. Stage label: "Harvesting". Image: wide still-life composition with dried rosemary spilling from a small linen drawstring pouch beside a terracotta pot. Caption: "WIDE · STILL LIFE COMPOSITION". Quote: "Aroma sealed, awaiting the next awakening."

Visual style: Photorealistic macro garden photography mixed with hand-crafted editorial scrapbook design, shallow depth of field, soft natural window light, earthy terracotta browns, rosemary greens, muted purple blossoms, warm sunlight, gentle film grain, slightly imperfect handwritten annotations.

Constraints: Keep the grid aligned and readable, use exactly 12 panels and no extra panels, avoid modern UI elements, avoid watermarks, avoid logos, preserve the vintage botanical journal feeling. Make all visible text legible and in En

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 琶音贝斯拟人化设定表
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a detailed vertical fantasy character sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Arpeggio (アルペジオ)"}, a humanized instrument spirit based on {argument name="instrument name" default="Wishbass 11 String Fanned Fret Bass"}. The sheet should look like a premium illustrated game-design reference page with sepia parchment paper, thin dark brown borders, elegant serif typography, and Japanese-inspired layout styling.

Canvas: Portrait orientation, approximately 3:4 ratio, aged cream paper background with a thin double-line frame and small corner ornaments. Use warm browns, walnut wood tones, black leather, muted red accents, and gold highlights. The overall style is painterly anime / fantasy concept art, highly detailed, refined, and print-ready.

Main subject: A tall androgynous young male character, early twenties, 182 cm impression, standing full-body on the left-center of the page while holding an enormous multi-string bass guitar upright like a sacred artifact. He has long messy {argument name="hair color" default="chestnut brown hair with reddish streaks"}, layered strands, loose waves, and a mysterious soft-blurred facial area with no detailed facial features. Outfit: sleeveless dark open vest, layered necklaces, leather wrist wraps, fingerless gloves, asymmetric belts, flowing dark cloth strips, black trousers, high boots, and wooden instrument-like armor panels. The character is calm, poetic, and solitary, as if listening to the resonance of wood. The bass is oversized, with 11 visible strings, fanned frets, a natural multi-tone wood body, dark fretboard, tuning pegs along an elongated headstock, and a rich luthier-crafted look.

Layout: Top left contains a large elegant title reading Arpeggio, with a smaller subtitle naming the instrument and a character sheet label. Down the left side beside the character, place a vertical poetic tagline in Japanese-style arrangement meaning: resonance connects, sound tells stories. Right side contains three stacked information panels. Bottom third contains expression portraits, standing-pose variations, notes, logo, and color palette.

Right-side panels: Include exactly 3 boxed panels. Panel 1 is Basic Information with 8 rows: name, species, gender, age, height, birthday, affiliation, and role. Panel 2 is Profile with a paragraph describing a spirit born from the Wishbass instrument, quiet and introverted, speaking through resonance and music. Panel 3 is Instrument Data with front and side views of the bass plus technical bullet points and a small tonal-range meter.

Instrument data details: Show exactly 2 instrument diagrams in the panel: one front view and one thin side view. Add concise specs: 11 strings, fanned fret scale, multi-wood body, through-neck or laminated neck construction, custom pickup, wide range, clear low tones, rich harmonics, and unique wood resonance. Include one horizontal tone-image bar labeled from low to high, with warm brown-to-gold coloring.

Lower sections: Include exactly 4 expression bust portraits in a row, each with the same blurred facial area and hair/outfit consistency. Label them as: normal, faint smile, performing, serious. To the right, include exactly 2 standing variation miniatures: stage outfit holding the giant bass dynamically, and casual artisan/workshop outfit standing with the bass. At bottom left, include a related settings / notes box with short lore bullets. At bottom center, include a simple Wishbass logo mark with a large W and small leather-and-bass-design text. At bottom right, include exactly 5 color swatches labeled by motif: walnut, maple, padauk, dark brown, and gold.

Text style: The page may use Japanese-style headings and compact annotation blocks, but keep the visible design clean and legible. Use elegant serif Latin text for the main title and small neat Japanese-style body text blocks for authenticity. Do not overcrowd the sheet beyond the described panels.

Constraints: Exactly 1 main full-body character
tags: 漫画 / 故事板 - 琶音贝斯拟人化设定表

prompts.title: 角色关系图海报生成器
prompts.prompt:
Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines information visualization, narrative structure, poster design sense, and stylistic fidelity.

Please automatically complete the following:
- Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme
- Extract the most representative 6–12 key characters, not exceeding 15 if necessary
- Identify and display key character relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc.
- Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's characteristics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution
- Automatically refine the work's style DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, typography, and representative elements
- Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship map, rather than simply copying an official poster
- Use different colors, line types, and arrows to distinguish different relationships, ensuring clear lines and layers without clutter
- Make core characters most prominent, followed by important characters, and subordinate characters weakened to form a clear visual hierarchy
- Ensure every character name is legible, with identity or faction labels if necessary

The final product should satisfy:
- Immediate understanding of character hierarchy and key relationships
- Obvious alignment with the original work's temperament and setting
- Combines the clarity of an infographic with the premium design of a poster
- Unified, exquisite, complete, and suitable for social media sharing or poster display
- Avoids a cheap flowchart feel, messy piling, and information overload.

prompts.prompt:

第一屏：眼眸中带着绽粉樱色的美瞳，睫毛缀满迷你春花，脸颊散落樱瓣与黄蕊小花，粉蝶萦绕眉眼，浅金发丝轻垂，下方簇簇樱花怒放，画面中央"SPRING"白色艺术字点缀，风格细腻唯美，光影柔和，色彩粉嫩治愈，下面用书法体写着春；

第二屏：眼眸中带着着清荷色的美瞳，睫毛饰以粉莲与绿荷，脸颊挂着晶莹水珠，粉瓣、绿荷点缀其间，蜻蜓轻绕，浅金发丝若隐若现，画面中央"Summer"白色艺术字凸显，光影通透流光感，色彩清透凉爽，下面用书法体写着夏；

第三屏：眼眸中带着金黄红相间的美瞳，睫毛饰以橙红枫叶，脸颊散落金红秋叶，橙蝶翩跹眉眼间，浅金发丝隐约可见，画面中央"AUTUMN"白色艺术字醒目，光影暖金流光，色彩浓郁温暖，下面用书法笔写着秋；

第四屏：眼眸中带着雪花蓝色的美瞳，睫毛覆满冰晶雪片，脸颊散落白色雪花与红色腊梅，银白蝴蝶翩跹眉眼，浅金发丝朦胧似雪，画面中央"WINTER"白色艺术字亮眼，光影冷冽蓝白流光，色彩清透纯净，下面用书法体写着冬。

整体呈现梦幻眼眸四季交替的唯美梦幻治愈画面，微调各屏的光影强度，让画面氛围感更浓郁。

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 暗黑波普柴郡猫女孩
prompts.prompt: Create a highly saturated dark-pop anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a Cheshire Cat inspired cat girl"} perched sideways on a thick tree branch in an enchanted forest at sunset. The character has an oversized mischievous feline head with purple and orange fur markings, large pointed ears with pink-blue inner ears, one huge glowing red-orange eye open, the other eye winking, long white whiskers, and a very wide toothy grin with sharp triangular teeth. Her body is humanoid but petite, wearing a gothic black puff-sleeve dress with white ruffled trim, a small black neck bow, lace details, and glossy black platform lace-up boots. Add exactly 5 prominent outfit elements: black puff-sleeve dress, white ruffled cuffs, black neck bow, striped arm sleeve, glossy platform boots. The visible legs wear bold horizontal striped thigh-high stockings in alternating pale blue, navy, cream, and warm peach tones. One arm has a vivid striped sleeve in red, pink, cyan, orange, and yellow, ending in a fluffy white cat paw glove with a ruffled cuff and small gold button. Include one huge curling fluffy tail sweeping across the lower foreground, colored with alternating purple and orange bands. Composition: vertical portrait, dynamic low-angle view, the character leaning forward playfully from the branch with legs dangling toward the viewer; one paw rests near the boots, the enormous tail frames the bottom. Background: tangled dark tree branches, glowing golden sun behind the head creating strong rim light, and stained-glass-like multicolored foliage in teal, magenta, yellow, orange, and violet. Visual style: {argument name="art style" default="glossy niji anime dark pop illustration"}, ultra-detailed linework, dramatic backlighting, neon color grading, high contrast shadows, luminous highlights, painterly texture, whimsical but slightly sinister Alice-in-Wonderland mood. Use {argument name="color palette" default="electric purple, orange, cyan, gold, magenta, and black"}. No text, no watermark, no frame, no extra characters.

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 红色网格中的匿名传奇
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 2×2 portrait grid titled by mood only, showing four anonymous legendary figures in dramatic red lighting, with their faces intentionally hidden by opaque rectangular censor blocks so they are recognizable only by silhouette, hair, posture, and styling.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 image, four equal panels separated by thick clean white gutters forming a cross. Each panel is a tight chest-up studio portrait against a dark crimson-to-black background with a vivid red rim light or glowing red spotlight behind the subject.

Layout: Exactly 4 portraits total: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right. Keep all subjects centered, cropped from upper chest to just above the head, wearing dark black coats or jackets over black shirts. Use high-contrast shadows, moody editorial photography, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and hair texture, and a premium magazine-cover look.

Subject details: Top-left portrait: an elderly figure with wild, voluminous white curly hair spreading outward, black overcoat, red halo light behind the hair. Top-right portrait: an older figure with short gray hair, dark beard or facial hair visible around the lower face, black coat, strong red side light. Bottom-left portrait: a bald middle-aged figure with glasses partly visible at the edges of the censor block, black coat, red rim light on shoulders. Bottom-right portrait: a younger-to-middle-aged figure with shoulder-length dark wavy hair, black coat, red light glowing behind the head.

Face concealment: Place exactly 4 opaque rectangular blocks, one centered over each face. The blocks should be vertical rectangles in warm brown skin-tone colors, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving hair, ears, neck, and clothing partly visible. Make the censor blocks flat, untextured, and deliberately artificial.

Style: Photorealistic studio portrait photography, dramatic red and black color palette, cinematic contrast, subtle film grain, sharp clothing edges, glowing red backlight, serious and iconic mood, no typography, no logos, no watermark.

Customizable direction: Use {argument name="color theme" default="deep crimson red and black"}, {argument name="portrait count" default="4"}, {argument name="subject theme" default="anonymous legendary figures"}, {argument name="censor block color" default="warm brown skin-tone"}, and {argument name="lighting style" default="dramatic red rim lighting"}.

prompts.title: 游乐场栏杆旁的哥特风动漫少女
prompts.prompt: 一张细节丰富的动漫风格插画，描绘了一位皮肤白皙的哥特少女身处色彩鲜艳的城市游乐场中。画面采用近景中景镜头，她身体前倾，咬住一根横向金属栏杆，表情调皮且略带叛逆。她留着一头笔直的长发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="漆黑"}，留着齐刘海，拥有一双鲜红色的眼睛，精致的面容上，小嘴轻压在栏杆上。她的右侧头发上装饰着 3 个几何发夹：1 个红色三角形发夹、1 个蓝色角形发夹和 1 个金色小圆环发夹。她佩戴着多个耳饰，包括几枚耳钉和悬垂的工业风耳环。她身穿一套黑色机能风哥特装束，包含 5 个明显的关键单品：1 件带有红蓝条纹装饰的黑色短款夹克、1 个黑色颈圈、1 件带有前扣的黑色绑带上衣或连衣裙、1 条带有金属配件的宽腰带，以及 1 条悬挂的腰链。她的袖子宽大且修长，其中一只前臂上有白色条纹细节。双手紧握栏杆，一只靠近嘴部，另一只向侧面延伸，营造出一种亲密而又充满对抗感的姿势。背景是游乐场，设施色彩鲜艳，包括蓝色立柱、红色连接件、黄红相间的攀爬杆，以及由蓝、红、黄、白、黑等大胆几何色块组成的橡胶地面。背景中有深绿色的树木和戏剧性的图形化天空，天空中有红色、橙色、蓝色、黑色和白色的大型扁平形状，以及圆形太阳状圆点，使整个场景呈现出海报般的波普艺术风格。在左侧蓝色立柱上包含 1 张带有日文和小型警示图标的垂直警告贴纸。采用清晰的赛璐珞阴影、锐利的线条、轻微的故障纹理点缀、超饱和的色彩、高对比度、忧郁的赛博哥特时尚氛围，以及聚焦于少女强烈眼神和金属栏杆的动态构图。

prompts.title: 动漫风格：镜中映出的年幼自我
prompts.prompt: 一张电影质感的动漫插画，描绘了一位成熟女性注视着一面昏暗的镜子，而镜中的倒影却是她年幼时的模样。前景中，这位成熟女性以四分之三侧背影示人，留着长直的 {argument name="hair color" default="金色"} 头发，皮肤白皙，身穿一件肩部饰有黑色羽毛状装饰的深色连衣裙。她正伸出右手触碰镜面。镜中映出的是她年幼时的样子，有着 {argument name="eye color" default="金色"} 的双眸、微微尖起的耳朵，身穿一件带有红色丝带蝴蝶结的简约白色连衣裙。孩子的掌心紧贴镜面，与成熟女性的手完美重合。场景采用昏暗、忧郁的电影级光影，色调柔和且近乎棕褐色，在苍白的肤色与深邃的背景之间形成强烈对比。左侧垂直排布的日文文字为 {argument name="left text" default="吸血鬼の始祖 怪異の王 キスショット・アセロラオリオン・ハートアンダーブレード"}，右侧文字为 {argument name="right text" default="私は・私の中にいる もう一人の私"}。

prompts.title: 奇幻漫画角色介绍页

prompts.prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-inspired steampunk group portrait of exactly 3 seated characters on a worn wooden bench in a dense retro-futuristic city alley. The trio consists of 1 left male figure, 1 center female figure, and 1 right male figure, all facing forward with intentionally featureless softly blurred faces. The left character is a slim young man wearing a black wide-brim hat, dark pinstripe three-piece suit, white shirt, narrow black tie, small lapel pins and medals, visible tattooed hands, cropped socks, and brown lace-up boots. The center character is a petite young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="short platinum-blonde bob hair"}, wearing a dark ornate double-breasted school-uniform-inspired jacket, white shirt, red patterned bow tie, decorative pins and brass buttons, a small red mechanical bird or toy perched near her hair, a short skirt, cream knee-high socks with intricate mechanical illustrations, red ankle straps, and glossy black platform Mary Jane shoes; her hands rest neatly on her knees. The right character is a slim young man in a navy tailored suit jacket, cream waistcoat, white shirt, patterned tie, many pins and medals, cropped trousers, cream socks, and dark brown leather shoes, sitting with hands clasped. The background should be packed wall-to-wall with countless vintage mechanical details: large clocks, turbine-like circular vents, gauges, pipes, gears, metal boxes, signs, wires, dials, old advertisements, and layered industrial panels, creating a cluttered whimsical steampunk marketplace facade. Use a muted cinematic palette of oxidized teal, rust red, brass, charcoal, cream, and weathered brown. Lighting is soft overcast daylight, sharp illustration detail, intricate linework, realistic fabric textures, antique metal patina, symmetrical centered composition, full-body view from head to shoes, cobblestone ground, no modern objects, no readable real-world branding, no extra characters. Overall mood: eccentric, fashionable, mysterious, and nostalgic, like {argument name="style influence" default="a richly detailed Japanese AI illustration blended with Victorian steampunk and retro street fashion"}.

prompts.title: 中国传统长卷插画
prompts.prompt: (国风长卷插画师) 你是一位顶尖的中国传统工笔人物画家，擅长将经典群像绘制成百科全书式的长卷海报。根据用户指定的 {argument name="character group" default="八仙"}，生成一张“中国传统人物群像长卷海报”：构图为横向长卷，所有人物从左至右依次排列；每个人物都拥有独特的传统服饰、标志性道具和神态，下方配有竖排名牌；卷轴顶部配有醒目的书法标题；背景包含主题场景元素（如祥云、波浪、山水、亭台等）。整体风格为高质量国风工笔插画：线条细腻，色彩典雅，背景为浅米色/宣纸纹理；标注使用清晰的中文书法字体；横向 4K 长卷海报，构图平衡，人物鲜明，氛围符合主题（如仙气、英气、温婉等）。直接输出图像，人物群组为 {argument name="character group" default="八仙"}。
